form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Sale Bm62 on March 29 over 1200m, slow going neck behind Akicita with 60kg at $2.70. Before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 8 at Cranbourne Cg&E Bm62 on March 20 over 1200m, 6 len behind Bold Response with 58kg at $3.90. Has ability and is one of the best chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign fifth of 8 at Albury Bm66 October 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind Morning Darling with 59.5kg at $26. Previously first up; seventh of 13 at Albury Bm58 May 27 over 1175m, on rain affected going; 5.5 len behind Yam with 66kg at $18. Prefer to see how he returns.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 6th of 11 at Yarra Valley Cg&E Bm56 on March 24 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Got Out The Fence carrying 60.5kg at $21. Previously second-up won by 1.5 len at Albury Mdn-Sw November 7 over 1400m defeating Ravens Glow carrying 57kg at $5.50. Improver and won't be far away.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Kyneton Cg&E Bm56 on February 27 over 1218m, slow going nose behind Geegee Jet By with 61.5kg at $3.90. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at Pakenham 0 - 62 on March 26 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 3.5 len behind Captain Cat with 58.5kg at $5.50. Racing well. Expected to be right in the finish.
